system.description: The corrupted character’s bones dissolve and his body turns to more of a liquid than a solid. He can define his own shape at will. Any mutation adding or removing body parts, besides eyes, is nullified, as he can create limbs at will. He can slip though any opening that isn’t watertight. Any Wounds inflicted by blunt weapons or similar sources are reduced in severity by 2 to a minimum of W1 and the damage is halved, rounded up.
